zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume Guerlenc de Corbeil Comte de Corbeil and Avranches於1001年出生在法國德 艾斯特芒內可貝爾時，他的父親Mauger de Normandie comte de Corbeil34歲，母親Germaine de Corbeil24歲。他去世於1067年5月27日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯沙吉莫-德-福瑟斯享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Corbeil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Fernand, Jean-Louis, Armand, Fernande, Gilles, Hugues, Huguette, Jean Pierre, Jean-Baptiste, Leonie.

French: from Old French corbeil ‘basket’ (from Late Latin corbicula, a diminutive of corbis ‘basket’), a metonymic occupational name for a maker and seller of baskets, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word because of a depression in the ground. Alternatively, a nickname derived from Old French corb ‘raven’ (see Corp ). Compare Curby and Kirby .
Altered form of French (mainly Loire-Atlantique) Gourbil, a surname which is most likely derived from the same Old French words corbeil ‘basket’ or corb ‘raven’ as the name in 1 above.

variants.name: Corp
meanings: English (mainly Somerset): in the southwest from Old French corp ‘raven’, probably applied as a nickname for someone with glossy dark hair. In northern and eastern (Scandinavian-influenced) counties the name may alternatively be derived from the cognate Old Norse korpr.
French: nickname from Old French corp ‘raven’ (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume Guerlenc de Corbeil Comte de Corbeil and Avranches was born in 1001, in Corbeil, Marne, Grand Est, France, his father, Mauger de Normandie comte de Corbeil, was 34 and his mother, Germaine de Corbeil, was 24. He died on 27 May 1067, in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume Guerlenc de Corbeil Comte de Corbeil and Avranches est né en 1001, à Corbeil, Marne, Grand Est, France, son père, Mauger de Normandie comte de Corbeil, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Germaine de Corbeil, avait 24 ans. Il est décédé le 27 mai 1067, à Saint-Maur-des-Fossés, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume Guerlenc de Corbeil Comte de Corbeil and Avranches 1001 in Corbeil, Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mauger de Normandie comte de Corbeil 34 und seine Mutter Germaine de Corbeil 24. Er starb am 27. Mai 1067 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume Guerlenc de Corbeil Comte de Corbeil and Avranches è nato il nel 1001 nel Corbeil, Marne, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Mauger de Normandie comte de Corbeil, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Germaine de Corbeil, aveva 24 anni. Morì il 27 maggio 1067, nel Saint-Maur-des-Fossés, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 66 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume Guerlenc de Corbeil Comte de Corbeil and Avranches(이)가 1001년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니 코르브일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mauger de Normandie comte de Corbeil(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Germaine de Corbeil(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1067년 5월 27일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세인트-모-데스-포스e스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume Guerlenc de Corbeil Comte de Corbeil and Avranches nasceu em 1001, em Corbeil, Marne, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Mauger de Normandie comte de Corbeil, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Germaine de Corbeil, tinha 24 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume Guerlenc de Corbeil Comte de Corbeil and Avranches родился в 1001 г. в местности корбил, марн, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Mauger de Normandie comte de Corbeil было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Germaine de Corbeil, 24. Он умер 27 мая 1067 г. в местности сеинт-маур-дес-фоссeс, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 66 лет.
